---
title: "spectral_density"
generated: true
description: "Dispatch a stationary-kernel spectral density (in `dim` dimensions)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.kernel`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:spectral_density -->
```python
spectral_density(omega: Float[Array, '...'], *, kernel: str, rho: Union[float, Float[Array, '']], amplitude: float = 1.0, dim: int = 1) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:spectral_density -->
Dispatch a stationary-kernel spectral density (in `dim` dimensions).

Selects and evaluates a spectral density by name, routing to
[`se_spectral_density`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel/se_spectral_density.qmd) for the squared-exponential family and
to [`matern_spectral_density`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel/matern_spectral_density.qmd) for the Matern families.  The
`kernel` string is matched case-insensitively after stripping
`/`, `-`, and `_`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:spectral_density -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `omega` | `Float` | `...` | — | Frequency magnitude $\\|w\\|$, of arbitrary shape. |
| `kernel` | `str` | — | — | Kernel name. Squared-exponential: `'rbf'`, `'se'`, `'sqexp'`, `'squaredexponential'`, `'gaussian'`. Matern: `'matern12'` / `'exp'` / `'exponential'` ($\nu = 1/2$), `'matern32'` ($\nu = 3/2$), `'matern52'` ($\nu = 5/2$). An unknown name raises `ValueError`. |
| `rho` | `Union[float, Float[Array, '']]` | — | — | Length scale $\rho$ (scalar or scalar array). |
| `amplitude` | `float` | — | `1.0` | Kernel amplitude $a$; the density scales as $a^2$. |
| `dim` | `int` | — | `1` | Input dimension $D$ (`1` for the one-dimensional case). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. Spectral density evaluated elementwise at `omega`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:spectral_density -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
